evals.prompt: What's the salary range for VP of Technology in Singapore in 2026? I have my CV uploaded already.
evals.expected_output: Finds existing CV version for personalization, calls ceevee_chat with the salary question and cv_version_id, presents AI analysis with sources from KB and live search.

assertions.name: checks_cv_versions
assertions.description: Calls ceevee_list_versions to find existing CV for personalization

assertions.name: sends_chat_with_cv
assertions.description: Calls ceevee_chat with message and cv_version_id

assertions.name: presents_salary_data
assertions.description: Shows salary ranges with market context and sources

assertions.name: mentions_followup
assertions.description: Offers to continue the conversation or explore related topics
